name: Skillet Herb Roasted Chicken
recipeIngredient: 10 1/2 ounces Campbell's Cream of Chicken Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the flour, sage, and thyme. Lightly coat each chicken thigh with the flour mixture.
2. Heat margarine in a skillet over medium-high heat. Add chicken and cook for 10 minutes or until browned on both sides; push chicken to one side of the pan.
3. Stir in the soup and water, stirring to loosen any browned bits.
4. Reduce heat to low. Cover the skillet and simmer for 5 minutes or until the chicken is fork tender.
5. Serve over rice. Garnish with fresh thyme if desired.
6. Makes 4 servings.
